data.title: vollsch BMX Style 12 14 16 Inch Kids Bike Training Wheels 20'' Bicycle with Kickstand for 2-14 Years Old Toddlers Boys Girls

features: Intended for Kids: Our BMX style toddlers bike caters specifically to novice riders embarking on their cycling journey. It features safety training wheels for balance (while the 20-inch bicycle only has a kickstand)
along with an adjustable seat to accommodate your child's development
Superior Quality: Crafted from high carbon steel
the bike frame is designed to withstand the rigors of uneven terrain without bending or breaking
offering essential safety for your child's adventures. Its robust construction and straightforward design ensure minimal maintenance needs

Safety and Sturdiness: The trusty coaster brake is perfect for toddlers who might not have the muscle power for hand brakes yet. The full chain guard keeps little fingers safe from getting caught in the chain. And those big 12 x 2.4-inch tires give a great grip to stop any slipping while they're riding
Easy Installation: The bike arrives with 85% of the assembly already completed
accompanied by essential assembly tools. By following our installation guide video and instructions
you will only need to attach a few components
which should take roughly 20 minutes to finish the final assembly process
Ensure Proper Fit: The 12-inch bike fits children 32 - 38 inches tall
aged 1 - 4 years. The 14-inch is ideal for kids 35 - 43 inches
aged 3 - 5 years. The 16-inch bike is designed for children 40 - 51 inches tall
suitable for ages 4 - 8 years. The 20-inch fits big kids 48 - 60 inches tall

relatedProducts.Title: Glerc Kids Bike for Ages 1-8 Years Old, 12-16 Inch BMX Style Kids Bicycle with Training Wheels, Boys Bike for Children and To
relatedProducts.Features: 【COOL BMX STYLE】With its sporty and lightweight BMX design, this kids bike is sure to be a hit with your child. It boosts self-confidence and inspires outdoor adventures, making it the ideal boys bike. | 【STURDY FRAME】Made of durable high tensile steel frame, this kids bike is strong enough to withstand everyday bumps and jumps, giving little riders a comfortable riding experience. | 【DUAL BRAKE SYSTEM】This kids bicycle is equipped with coaster brake, providing reliable braking performance, making it easy for even beginners to control the speed of the bike, which can ensure a safe ride and help cycling learning. | 【SIZE GUIDE】This 12 inch bike is suitable for children ages 1-4, 33"-37" tall, with an inseam height of 13"-16". The bike weighs 20 lbs. Please focus on your child's height and inseam to choose the size. | 【85% PRE-ASSEMBLED】The main parts of the children's bike are pre-assembled to save you time and effort. With final assembly in just 20 minutes, your child will be ready to embark on a fun journey in no time.

relatedProducts.Title: JOYSTAR Kids Bike for Ages 2-12 Years Old Boys Girls, 12-20 Inch BMX Style Kid's Bikes with Training Wheels, Children Bicycle for Kids and Toddler, Multiple Colors
relatedProducts.Features: DESIGN FOR KIDS - 1. This Kids bike comes with stable training wheel early rider. 2.Quick release seat simplify the height adjustment. 3.Saddle with holder to learn riding when the training wheel is off. 4.Foot brake suitable for young rider don't have enough power to manipulate the hand brake. | MINIMUM MAINTENANCE - Made of premium steel to survive the bumps of learning, the durable steel frame is backed by our limited lifetime warranty. The bike comes with black tire & single speed, only little maintenance needed due to the simple design. | DIY DECAL & SAFE CHAIN GURAD - Your child will get a DIY decal, they could make a unique bike with the decal by sticking their name on the frame or chain guard. The chain guard well protects the chain, it will last longer than other bikes, your child will not get hurt when try to touch the chain. | EASY TO INSTALL - The children bike comes with 85% Pre-assembled body and the basic assembly tools, only pump needed for tire, normally takes a novice about 20 minutes to assemble it. If you have problem about assembly or the bike, please contact us. | RECOMMENDED SIZE CHART - 12" BIKE FOR 2-4 YEARS (33"-41") TODDLER, 14" bike for 3-5 years (35" - 47") child, 16" bike for 4-7 years (41" - 53") boys & girls, 18" bike for 5-9 years (43"-59") boys & girls. Note: child height may vary even at the same age, please take the height into consideration.

Sections.Title: aplus content video
Texts: Gets Kids Outside Playing outdoors has been proven to have a variety of benefits for kids
Improve Coordination and Balance Bicycling not only engages the whole body, but also multiple different parts of the brain.
Promotes Kids’ Self-Confidence and Independence Learning to ride a bike is difficult. mastering that skill can boost kids’ self-confidence
Keeps Kids Physically Healthy Riding a bike is a great way to ensure that kids stay active and healthy.
The whole family can enjoy together Cycling with kids can help you be close to them, understand their problems and worries

Bikes are some of the most memorable and useful gifts you can give this holiday season. When you give a child a kids bike that fits them, you are beginning a life-long habit of healthy fun. They will learn independence, balance, and fitness.
